description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”驾驶辅助功能受限”提示，表示前向碰撞预警 (FCW) 或自动紧急制动 (AEB) 功能受限。可能由前视摄像头或雷达传感器视野受阻（雨雪、脏污、强光等）或系统故障引起。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请安全停车并建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在功能恢复前，请保持安全车距，集中注意力驾驶。尝试清洁前方传感器区域（摄像头、雷达）可能有助于恢复功能。
description_en: This indicates your Forward Collision Warning (FCW) or Autonomous Emergency Braking (AEB) is currently limited or unavailable. The 'Driver Assistance Functions Limited' message appears when the front camera or radar sensors are obstructed by rain, dirt, glare, or debris, or if there's a system malfunction.
action_en: Safely pull over and contact a BYD authorised service centre. Until the system is restored, maintain a safe following distance and drive with extra caution. Try cleaning the front sensor areas (camera and radar) as this may help restore functionality.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”驾驶辅助功能受限”提示，表示盲区监测 (BSD) 功能受限。后方传感器可能因脏污、遮挡或故障而无法正常工作。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请安全停车建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在功能恢复前，变道时请通过后视镜仔细确认盲区安全。
description_en: This warning indicates the Blind Spot Detection (BSD) system is limited or unavailable. The rear sensors may be dirty, obstructed, or faulty.
action_en: Safely pull over and contact your nearest BYD authorised service centre. Until the system is restored, manually check your blind spots using your mirrors before changing lanes.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”驾驶辅助功能受限”提示，表示车道偏离预警 (LDW) 或车道偏离抑制功能 (LDP) 受限。前视摄像头可能因雨雪、脏污或强光等因素无法正常识别车道标线。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请停车建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在功能恢复前，请集中注意力手动保持车道。可尝试清洁挡风玻璃上的摄像头区域。
description_en: Lane Departure Warning (LDW) or Lane Departure Prevention (LDP) is currently limited. The front camera is unable to detect lane markings properly, which may be caused by rain, snow, dirt, or glare.
action_en: Safely pull over and contact an authorised BYD service centre. Until the system is restored, remain attentive and manually maintain your lane position. Try cleaning the camera area on the windscreen.

name_cn: 请检查自动紧急制动系统
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查自动紧急制动系统”或”自动紧急制动功能受限”提示，表示自动紧急制动 (AEB) 系统有故障或功能受限。该系统在检测到即将发生前方碰撞时可自动施加制动力。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请停车建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在 AEB 功能恢复前，务必保持足够的安全车距，提高警惕性。
description_en: The dashboard displays 'Check Automatic Emergency Braking System' or 'AEB Function Limited', indicating the AEB system has a fault or reduced functionality. This safety feature automatically applies braking when it detects an imminent frontal collision.
action_en: Stop when safe and contact a BYD authorised service centre. Until the system is repaired, maintain a greater following distance from the vehicle ahead and remain extra vigilant.

name_cn: 请检查多功能视频控制器
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查多功能视频控制器”或”多功能视频控制器功能受限”提示，表示多功能视频控制器有故障或功能受限。该控制器负责处理车辆摄像头视频信号，故障时可能影响全景影像、行车记录等功能。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请停车建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。此故障通常不影响基本行驶安全，但影像辅助功能可能不可用。
description_en: Your dashboard is displaying 'Please check multifunction video controller' or 'Multifunction video controller function limited'. This indicates the unit that processes your vehicle's camera signals has malfunctioned or has restricted functionality, which may disable features such as your surround-view camera system and dashcam.
action_en: Please pull over when safe and contact a BYD authorised service centre. While this fault generally doesn't affect basic driving safety, your camera assistance features may be unavailable.

name_cn: 环境受限，智能摄像头不可用
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”环境受限，智能摄像头不可用”提示，表示由于环境条件（如浓雾、暴雨、强光、极端温度等）导致智能摄像头无法正常工作，依赖摄像头的驾驶辅助功能（如 LDW、FCW、AEB 等）将暂时不可用。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请停车建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。如果是临时环境因素（天气、光线），待环境条件改善后功能通常会自动恢复。如果在正常环境下仍出现此提示，建议检查前视摄像头是否脏污或受损。
description_en: This warning indicates that environmental conditions such as heavy fog, heavy rain, bright glare or extreme temperatures are preventing the smart camera from operating normally. Camera-dependent driving assistance features including Lane Departure Warning (LDW), Forward Collision Warning (FCW) and Autonomous Emergency Braking (AEB) will be temporarily unavailable.
action_en: Pull over when safe to do so and contact a BYD authorised service centre. If the warning is due to temporary weather or lighting conditions, the features should automatically restore once conditions improve. If this message persists under normal driving conditions, check whether the front-facing camera is dirty or damaged.

name_cn: 辅助驾驶功能暂时不可用
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”辅助驾驶功能暂时不可用”提示，表示驾驶辅助系统因外部环境条件受限而暂时无法正常工作。常见原因包括：大雨、大雪、浓雾等恶劣天气影响传感器感知能力；摄像头或雷达表面被污物覆盖；强烈逆光或光线不足导致视觉传感器无法正常工作；进入隧道等特殊场景。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 此为环境因素引起的暂时性提示，通常在环境条件改善后系统会自动恢复。可尝试清洁摄像头和雷达传感器表面。如果在正常天气和路况下频繁出现此提示，建议联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查传感器状态。
description_en: This warning indicates that the Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) are temporarily unavailable due to external environmental conditions affecting sensor performance. Common causes include heavy rain, snow, or fog impairing sensor visibility; dirt or debris covering the cameras or radar; strong glare or low light conditions affecting visual sensors; or driving through tunnels and similar low-visibility environments.
action_en: This is a temporary warning that typically clears automatically once driving conditions improve. Try cleaning the camera lenses and radar sensors. If this warning appears frequently during normal weather and road conditions, contact your nearest BYD authorised service centre to have the sensors inspected.

name_cn: 自适应巡航故障警告灯
name_en: Adaptive Cruise Control Malfunction Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 该指示灯常亮时，表示自适应巡航控制 (ACC) 系统存在故障，无法正常工作。可能由前方雷达传感器脏污、遮挡或系统硬件故障引起。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议将车辆送到比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行检查。在故障修复前，请勿使用自适应巡航功能，改为手动控制车速和车距。
description_en: When this warning light stays on, it indicates a fault with the Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system and it cannot operate normally. This may be caused by dirt or obstruction on the front radar sensor, or a system hardware fault.
action_en: Take your vehicle to a BYD authorised service centre for inspection. Do not use cruise control until the fault is repaired—manually control your speed and following distance instead.

name_en: Blind Spot Detection Malfunction Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此指示灯点亮时表示盲区监测 (BSD) 驾驶辅助功能受限或故障。可能由后方超声波传感器或毫米波雷达脏污、损坏或系统故障引起。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议将车辆送到比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行检查。在功能恢复前，变道时请格外注意通过后视镜确认盲区情况。
description_en: This warning light indicates the Blind Spot Detection (BSD) driver assistance system is limited or faulty. This may be caused by dirty or damaged rear ultrasonic sensors or millimetre-wave radar, or a system malfunction.
action_en: Take your vehicle to an authorised BYD service centre for inspection. Until the system is repaired, take extra care to check your blind spots using your mirrors when changing lanes.

name_cn: 车道辅助系统故障警告灯
name_en: Lane Assist System Malfunction Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此指示灯点亮时表示车道偏离预警 (LDW) 或车道偏离抑制 (LDP) 系统存在故障，无法正常提供车道保持辅助。可能由前视摄像头脏污、遮挡或系统硬件故障引起。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议将车辆送到比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行检查。在功能恢复前，驾驶时请集中注意力保持车辆在车道内行驶。
description_en: Indicates a malfunction in the Lane Departure Warning (LDW) or Lane Departure Prevention (LDP) system. Lane keeping assistance is currently unavailable. This may be due to a dirty or obstructed front camera, or a hardware fault.
action_en: Take your vehicle to a BYD authorised service centre for inspection. Until the system is repaired, remain attentive and manually keep your vehicle within the lane.

name_cn: 自适应前照灯故障警告灯
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此警告灯点亮时表示自适应前照灯系统存在故障，自适应远光灯或弯道照明功能可能无法正常工作。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议将车辆送到比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行检查。在故障修复前，前照灯基本照明功能通常仍可使用，但自动调节功能不可用。夜间行驶时需手动控制远近光切换。
description_en: This indicates a fault with the adaptive headlight system. The automatic high beam or cornering light function may not operate correctly.
action_en: Have your vehicle inspected at a BYD authorised service centre. Basic headlight functions should still work, but you'll need to manually switch between high and low beam when driving at night until the system is repaired.

name_cn: 驾驶员监测辅助系统故障警告灯
name_en: Driver Monitoring System (DMS) Fault Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 驾驶员监测辅助系统（DMS）发生故障时，此警告灯点亮。DMS 通过车内摄像头实时监测驾驶员的注意力状态，包括疲劳驾驶、分心驾驶等危险行为，并在检测到异常时发出警告。故障状态下，系统无法正常监测驾驶员状态。此功能出现在汉L、海豹06等配备智能驾驶辅助的车型上。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检修。在系统修复前，驾驶员应自觉保持注意力集中，避免疲劳驾驶。长途驾驶时应定时休息。
description_en: This warning light indicates a fault with the Driver Monitoring System (DMS). The DMS uses an interior camera to monitor driver attentiveness in real time, detecting fatigue or distraction and issuing warnings when necessary. When illuminated, the system is unable to monitor your driving state. This feature is available on intelligent driver-assist models such as the BYD Han L and Seal 06.
action_en: Contact your nearest BYD authorised service centre to have the system checked and repaired. Until then, stay alert and avoid driving when tired. Be sure to take regular breaks on long trips.

name_cn: 邻车靠近避让故障警告灯
name_en: Emergency Lane Keeping Assist (ELKA) Fault Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 邻车靠近避让辅助系统（ELKA）发生故障时，此警告灯点亮。ELKA 系统可在检测到相邻车道车辆快速靠近、存在侧面碰撞风险时，自动辅助转向以避让危险。系统故障时无法提供此项安全辅助功能。此功能出现在海狮07等较新车型上。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检修。在系统修复前，驾驶员应特别注意观察后视镜和盲区，在变道和并线时保持高度警惕。
description_en: This warning light indicates a fault with the Emergency Lane Keeping Assist (ELKA) system. ELKA automatically helps steer your vehicle away from danger when it detects a vehicle in the next lane approaching rapidly and posing a side collision risk. When this light is on, the safety feature is unavailable. This system is fitted to newer models such as the BYD Sealion 7.
action_en: Contact an authorised BYD service centre to have the system inspected and repaired. Until the fault is fixed, pay extra attention to your mirrors and blind spots, and exercise extreme caution when changing lanes or merging.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当车辆配备的交通标志识别系统正常工作时，此指示灯在识别到限速标志时点亮，显示当前道路限速值。该系统通过前置摄像头识别路侧限速标志牌，提醒驾驶员遵守限速要求。如果此指示灯无法正常显示或频繁误报，可能是摄像头遮挡、污染或系统故障。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 此灯点亮属于正常信息提示。如果识别结果频繁错误，请检查前挡风玻璃摄像头区域是否清洁。持续异常时建议联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店校准摄像头。注意：限速识别仅供参考，驾驶员应以实际道路标志为准。
description_en: This indicator illuminates when the Traffic Sign Recognition system detects a speed limit sign, displaying the current road speed limit. The system uses the front windscreen camera to identify roadside signs and remind you of speed restrictions. If the indicator fails to display, shows incorrect limits, or triggers false alerts, the camera may be obstructed, dirty, or the system may require servicing.
action_en: This light is a normal information prompt. If speed limits are frequently misread, clean the camera area located at the top of the windscreen. If abnormal operation persists, contact a BYD authorised service centre for camera calibration. Note: Speed limit recognition is for guidance only; always follow actual posted road signs.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查车载充电系统”提示，表示车载充电系统有故障。可能是充电连接异常、车载充电机 (OBC) 故障或充电线路问题。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请检查充电连接有无异常，重新连接充电设备。如不能解决，建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。
description_en: This warning indicates a fault with your vehicle's onboard charging system. The issue may be a loose or faulty charging connection, an On-Board Charger (OBC) malfunction, or a problem with the charging wiring.
action_en: Check your charging cable connection and try reconnecting the charger. If the warning persists, contact a BYD authorised service centre.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 如果此灯点亮，表示动力电池温度太高，须停车降温。动力电池过热警告灯闪烁时，情况更为紧急，建议立即安全停车并尽快撤离车辆。在下列工作条件中，动力电池可能会产生过热现象：在炎热的天气进行长时间长途爬坡；在长时间停停走走的交通状态，频繁急加速、急刹车的状况，或长时间车辆运转得不到休息的状况。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 立即安全停车降温。如果动力电池过热警告灯闪烁，建议立即安全停车并尽快撤离车辆，远离车辆并拨打比亚迪客服热线或 119。切勿继续驾驶。
description_en: If this light illuminates, your high-voltage battery is overheating and you must pull over immediately to allow it to cool. A flashing warning light indicates a critical situation – stop the vehicle safely and evacuate as soon as possible. The battery may overheat during: extended uphill driving in hot weather; prolonged stop-start traffic with frequent rapid acceleration and heavy braking; or continuous operation without adequate rest periods.
action_en: Pull over to a safe location immediately and allow the battery to cool. If the warning light is flashing, stop the vehicle safely, evacuate immediately, move well away from the vehicle, and contact BYD roadside assistance or call Triple Zero (000). Do not continue driving.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当整车电源挡位刚切换到启动挡时，此灯点亮。如果动力电池系统工作正常，则几秒钟后此灯熄灭。此后，如果系统发生故障，此灯将再次点亮。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议尽快与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系检查车辆。如果发生以下任何情况，说明由警告灯系统监控的部件中发生故障：当整车处于启动挡电时，此灯持续亮；驾驶中此灯持续或偶然点亮。
description_en: This light comes on briefly when you first start the vehicle. If the high voltage battery system is working properly, it will turn off after a few seconds. If a fault develops in the system, the light will illuminate again.
action_en: Contact a BYD authorised service centre as soon as possible to have your vehicle inspected. A fault is indicated if the light stays on while the vehicle is in READY mode, or if it illuminates (continuously or intermittently) while driving.

name_cn: 动力电池电量低警告灯
name_en: Traction Battery Low Charge Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 动力电池剩余电量过低时，此警告灯点亮。表示需要尽快为车辆充电，否则车辆可能因电量耗尽而无法继续行驶。在 DM-i 车型上，发动机会自动启动为电池补充电量。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 尽快寻找充电桩或充电站为车辆充电。在到达充电点之前，建议开启经济模式、关闭不必要的用电设备（如空调、座椅加热等），减少能耗以延长续航。
description_en: This warning indicates your battery charge is critically low. You need to charge your vehicle urgently, or it may shut down due to insufficient power. In DM-i hybrid models, the engine will automatically start to recharge the battery.
action_en: Find a charging station immediately. Until you reach it, switch to Eco mode and turn off non-essential electrical features (such as air conditioning and seat heaters) to conserve energy and maximise your remaining range.

name_cn: 低压供电系统故障警告灯
name_en: Low Voltage Power Supply Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 整车 DC 系统或低压蓄电池故障时提醒。该警告灯点亮时会停止充电、放电。行车过程中该警告灯持续点亮，车辆会限制车速。非充放电时此灯用于警告 DC 模块及低压蓄电池模块的工作状态。如果在驾驶中此灯点亮，表示 DC 系统或低压蓄电池系统存在问题。在 DM-i 车型上，表示充电系统/DC系统/低压供电系统存在故障，发动机点火能够继续进行，但只能进行到电池放完电为止。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 应关闭空调、风扇、多媒体等非必要用电设备，建议尽快将车开到最近的比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行维修。
description_en: Indicates a fault with the vehicle's DC system or low voltage battery. When illuminated, charging and discharging will cease. If the light stays on while driving, the vehicle will limit speed. When not charging or discharging, this light indicates the status of the DC and low voltage battery modules. If illuminated during driving, there is a problem with the DC or low voltage battery system. On DM-i hybrid models, this indicates a charging system, DC system or low voltage supply fault; the engine can continue to run but only until the battery is fully discharged.
action_en: Switch off non-essential electrical devices including air conditioning, fans and multimedia systems. Proceed immediately to your nearest authorised BYD service centre for inspection and repair.

name_cn: 动力电池充电连接指示灯
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当充电枪正确插入车辆充电口并建立连接后，此指示灯点亮，表示充电系统已就绪或正在充电。充电完成后此灯可能变为常亮或熄灭（视车型而定）。如果充电枪已连接但此灯未点亮，可能存在充电口接触不良、充电枪故障或车辆充电系统异常。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 正常充电时此灯点亮属于正常状态。如果充电枪已插入但此灯不亮，请检查充电枪是否插紧，确认充电桩是否正常供电。如仍无法充电，建议更换充电桩或联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查车辆充电接口。
description_en: This indicator illuminates when the charging plug is securely connected to your vehicle's charge port, indicating that the charging system is ready or actively charging. Once charging is complete, the light may remain steady or turn off depending on your vehicle model. If the cable is plugged in but the light doesn't come on, there may be a loose connection at the charge port, a fault with the charging cable, or an issue with the vehicle's charging system.
action_en: It's normal for this light to be on during charging. If the charging plug is inserted but the light doesn't illuminate, check that it's fully seated and verify the charging station is powered on. If charging still doesn't start, try a different charging station or contact a BYD authorised service centre to inspect your vehicle's charge port.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查ESC系统”提示，表示电子车身稳定控制系统检测到异常。ESC 系统通过监测车辆行驶状态，在检测到侧滑或失控趋势时自动介入制动，帮助驾驶员保持对车辆的控制。此提示出现时，ESC 功能可能已部分或完全失效。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议尽快联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检修。在 ESC 失效期间，应避免急转弯、高速变道等激烈驾驶操作。雨天、雪天或湿滑路面上尤其需要谨慎驾驶。
description_en: The 'Check ESC System' warning indicates your Electronic Stability Control has detected a fault. ESC constantly monitors vehicle behaviour and automatically applies individual brakes if it detects skidding or loss of traction to help you maintain control. When this warning appears, the system may be partially or fully disabled.
action_en: Arrange for your vehicle to be inspected at an authorised BYD service centre as soon as possible. Until repaired, avoid aggressive driving including sharp cornering and rapid lane changes. Take extra care on wet, icy, or slippery roads.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 车辆启动自检时，ABS 警告灯短暂点亮后熄灭，表示防抱死制动系统工作正常。如果系统发生故障，此灯将再次点亮直至故障消除。当 ABS 故障警告灯点亮时（驻车系统故障警告灯熄灭），防抱死制动系统不工作，但驻车系统仍将正常工作。ABS 具有自检功能，如果发生任何故障，仪表盘上的防抱死制动装置指示灯将点亮，这意味着制动系统的防抱死制动功能已经失灵。此时制动器仍会像没有防抱死功能的常规车辆那样提供普通的制动能力。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议尽快联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店专业人员检查车辆。如果发生以下任何一种情况，说明由警告灯系统监控的部件中发生故障：电源挡位位于启动挡时，警告灯不亮或持续点亮；驾驶中此警告灯点亮。注意：如果 ABS 故障警告灯和驻车系统故障警告灯同时点亮，并且刹车已被完全释放，则表明前后轮制动力分配系统也已失灵。应立刻将车辆停在安全的地方并与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。
description_en: During vehicle start-up, the ABS warning light briefly illuminates as part of the system self-check, then turns off to indicate the anti-lock braking system is operating normally. If a fault develops, the light will remain on until the issue is resolved. When illuminated (provided the parking brake warning light is off), the ABS function is disabled, though standard braking and the parking brake remain fully operational. While the anti-lock feature is unavailable when this light is on, your vehicle will retain conventional braking ability similar to a car without ABS.
action_en: Arrange for inspection at a BYD authorised service centre as soon as possible. A fault is indicated if the warning light fails to illuminate when starting the vehicle, stays on continuously, or activates during driving. Important: If both the ABS and parking brake warning lights illuminate simultaneously while the brake pedal is fully released, this indicates a failure of the front-to-rear brake force distribution system. Immediately pull over in a safe location and contact a BYD authorised service centre.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 车辆启动自检时，ESC 警告灯短暂点亮后熄灭，表示电子车身稳定系统工作正常。如果系统发生故障，此警告灯再次点亮直至系统故障消除。当车辆在行驶过程中 ESC 故障警告灯闪烁时，表明 ESC 系统正在工作。当 ESC 故障警告灯点亮时（ABS 故障警告灯、驻车系统故障警告灯熄灭），ESC 车辆稳定性控制失效，但是防抱死制动系统及制动系统仍将正常工作。当 ESC 故障警告灯点亮时（ABS 故障警告灯、驻车系统故障警告灯熄灭），由于车辆稳定性控制系统不工作，在紧急急转弯、紧急躲避前方障碍物时，车辆将处于极其不稳定的状态。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 如果发生以下任何一种情况，说明由警告灯系统监控的部件中发生故障，建议尽快与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系检查车辆：电源挡位位于启动挡时，警告灯上电后一直不亮或持续点亮；驾驶中此警告灯点亮。注意：如果 ABS 故障警告灯、制动系统警告灯点亮的同时，ESC 故障警告灯仍然亮，建议立刻将车辆停在安全的地方并与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系，因为此时制动时不但防抱死制动系统完全不起作用，而且车辆防抱死制动系统也完全不起作用。
description_en:
When starting your vehicle, the ESC (Electronic Stability Control) warning light will briefly illuminate during the system self-check, then turn off – this indicates normal operation. If a fault occurs, the light will remain on until the issue is resolved.

While driving, a flashing ESC light means the system is actively working to stabilise the vehicle. If the light stays on steadily (while the ABS and parking brake warning lights remain off), the stability control function has been disabled, though your anti-lock braking system and standard brakes will continue to function normally. However, without stability control, your vehicle may become unstable during emergency swerving or sudden evasive manoeuvres.
action_en:
Arrange for your vehicle to be inspected at a BYD authorised service centre as soon as possible if:
• The warning light does not illuminate at startup, or stays on continuously when the vehicle is powered on
• The light illuminates while you are driving

Important: If the ESC warning light comes on together with both the ABS and brake system warning lights, pull over to a safe location immediately and contact BYD Roadside Assistance or your nearest authorised service centre. In this situation, your anti-lock braking system is not operational, significantly reducing braking effectiveness and vehicle safety.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 车辆启动自检时，此灯点亮几秒后熄灭。当按下 ESC OFF 开关时，此灯应持续点亮，此时车辆稳定性控制系统不起作用。当再次按下 ESC OFF 开关后，此灯应熄灭，且车辆稳定性控制系统功能恢复正常。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 如果 ESC OFF 警告灯点亮，在紧急转弯以及躲避突然出现的障碍物时，驾驶员务必提高警惕并保持低速行驶。因为此时制动时 ESC 系统功能不起作用，车辆将会变得不稳定。
description_en: This light illuminates briefly during vehicle startup as part of the system self-check, then turns off. When you press the ESC OFF switch, the light stays on continuously to indicate that Electronic Stability Control is deactivated. Pressing the switch again turns the light off and restores normal ESC function.
action_en: If the ESC OFF warning light remains on, exercise extra caution during sharp cornering or when swerving to avoid unexpected obstacles, and reduce your speed. Without Electronic Stability Control active, your vehicle may become unstable during braking or sudden manoeuvres.

name_en: Parking Brake / Brake System Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当制动液液位低且制动系统故障时，此警告灯点亮。车辆启动后，如果制动液液位正常，并且电子驻车系统正常工作时（电子驻车开关拉起、释放正常，没有提示”请检查电子驻车系统”），此故障警告灯常亮。EPB 系统有故障时此警告灯常亮，此时表明车辆驻车系统有故障，需要将车辆开到平坦路面以避免溜车。智能动力制动系统故障时也会点亮。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 如果发生下列任何一种情况，立刻将车辆停在安全的地方并建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系：电源挡位处于启动挡且当制动液液位低时，此警告灯点亮；驻车制动故障警告和 ABS 故障警告灯同时点亮时。警告：在制动液液位低的状态下，持续进行驾驶非常危险，请勿持续进行驾驶。
description_en: This warning light indicates low brake fluid or a brake system malfunction. If the light stays on continuously after starting the vehicle, it signals a fault with the Electronic Parking Brake (EPB) system. Park on level ground immediately to prevent the vehicle from rolling. The light also illuminates when there is a fault with the Intelligent Power Brake system.
action_en: If any of the following occurs, stop the vehicle immediately in a safe location and contact an authorised BYD service centre: the warning light illuminates when the vehicle is powered on and the brake fluid level is low; or the parking brake warning light and ABS warning light illuminate simultaneously. Warning: Continuing to drive with low brake fluid is extremely dangerous. Do not continue driving.

name_cn: 自动紧急制动报警警告灯
name_en: Automatic Emergency Braking Alert Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此指示灯点亮或闪烁时，表示前向碰撞预警 (FCW) 或自动紧急制动 (AEB) 系统检测到前方存在碰撞风险，需要注意与前车的距离，不要离得太近，小心发生碰撞。该功能属于驾驶辅助系统的安全提醒。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 立即注意前方路况，适当减速并保持安全车距。如果此灯在无危险的情况下频繁点亮，建议到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查传感器和系统状态。
description_en: This warning light indicates your Forward Collision Warning (FCW) or Autonomous Emergency Braking (AEB) system has detected a potential collision risk ahead. It's alerting you to maintain a safe distance from the vehicle in front and avoid tailgating. This is a safety reminder from your driver assistance systems.
action_en: Keep your eyes on the road ahead, reduce your speed, and maintain a safe following distance. If this light comes on frequently when there's no danger present, book your vehicle in at a BYD authorised service centre to have the sensors and system checked.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当制动系统发生故障时，此警告灯点亮。与驻车系统故障警告灯不同，此灯专门指示制动液压系统或智能制动助力系统故障。制动液液位低或制动助力失效时也会触发此警告灯。在某些车型中，制动系统故障警告灯与驻车制动警告灯为同一指示灯，但触发条件有所不同。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 立即将车辆安全停靠，切勿继续行驶。制动系统故障可能导致制动距离大幅增加甚至制动失效。应立即联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店或拨打救援电话。警告：在此灯点亮时继续驾驶极其危险。
description_en: This warning light indicates a fault in the brake system. Unlike the parking brake warning light, this specifically signals a failure in the brake hydraulic system or intelligent brake booster. It will also illuminate if brake fluid levels are low or brake assist has failed. Note that in some models, this shares the same indicator as the parking brake light, but activates under different fault conditions.
action_en: Safely pull over immediately and do not continue driving. A brake system fault can significantly increase stopping distances or result in complete brake failure. Contact a BYD authorised service centre or call for roadside assistance straight away. Warning: Driving while this light is illuminated is extremely dangerous.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查HDC系统”提示，表示陡坡缓降控制 (HDC) 系统有故障。HDC 系统用于在下坡时自动控制车速，使车辆以较低且稳定的速度下坡。故障时该功能不可用。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在 HDC 功能恢复前，下坡时请使用制动踏板手动控制车速，谨慎驾驶。
description_en: This warning indicates a fault with the Hill Descent Control (HDC) system. HDC automatically manages your speed when driving downhill to maintain a slow, steady descent. When faulty, this feature is unavailable.
action_en: Contact a BYD authorised service centre. Until the HDC system is repaired, use the brake pedal to manually control your speed when descending hills and drive with caution.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 转向系统出现故障，此警告灯常亮时，转向助力可能减弱或消失。转向系统采用电机来减小转动转向盘所需的力。转动转向盘时，可能会听到电机工作的声音(“嗡嗡”声)，这并不表示出现了故障。转向盘打到极限位置的持续时间不超过 5 秒，否则会启动温度保护导致转向沉重或损坏。长时间频繁的原地转动转向盘时，转向系统故障警告灯未点亮，但感觉转向沉重，此现象为非故障模式——为防止系统过热，转向系统的助力效果会降低。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议将车辆送到比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行检查。如果转向系统故障警告灯点亮，请立刻将车辆停在安全的地方并建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。如果发生转向助力降低（感觉转向沉重但无故障灯），应避免频繁转动转向盘或停车并关闭整车电源，10 分钟内系统恢复正常。
description_en: Indicates a steering system malfunction. When this warning light remains on, power steering assistance may be reduced or lost. The system uses an electric motor to assist steering, and a humming noise during operation is normal. Avoid holding the steering wheel at full lock for more than 5 seconds, as this triggers thermal protection that can cause heavy steering or damage. If steering feels heavy during prolonged stationary manoeuvring without the warning light illuminating, this is not a fault—the system temporarily reduces assist to prevent overheating.
action_en: Arrange for inspection at a BYD authorised service centre. If the warning light illuminates while driving, immediately park in a safe location and contact a BYD authorised service centre. If steering becomes heavy without the warning light (thermal protection mode), avoid frequent steering inputs or park and switch the vehicle off for 10 minutes to allow the system to recover.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 车辆启动自检时，此警告灯短暂点亮后熄灭，表示胎压监测系统工作正常。如果系统发生故障，此警告灯将再次点亮。当胎压故障警告灯点亮或闪烁，同时仪表信息显示屏显示”请检查胎压监测系统”，胎压显示界面数值位显示”---“时，表示胎压系统有故障。当提示”信号异常”时，表示车辆所在位置胎压信号可能受到干扰或者胎压监测模块损坏。当胎压故障警告灯常亮，同时组合仪表胎压显示界面有一个或多个数值位变黄时，表示对应轮胎处于欠压状态。有一个或多个轮胎及温度数值变黄时，表示轮胎温过高。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 如果发生任何上述情况，建议尽快与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系检查车辆。在行驶前应检查轮胎外观是否有明显漏气或损坏。如果胎压过低，应及时补充胎压至推荐值。
description_en:
At vehicle startup, this warning light will briefly illuminate then turn off during the system self-check – this indicates the Tyre Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS) is functioning normally. If the system develops a fault, the light will illuminate again.

If the TPMS warning light illuminates or flashes while the instrument display shows 'Please check tyre pressure monitoring system' and the pressure readings display '---', this indicates a TPMS malfunction. A 'signal abnormal' message suggests interference with the tyre pressure signal at your current location, or possible damage to the monitoring module.

If the warning light remains steadily lit while one or more tyre pressure values turn yellow on the display, the corresponding tyre(s) are underinflated. If any tyre temperature values appear yellow, this indicates the tyre(s) are overheating.
action_en: If any of these situations occur, contact a BYD authorised service centre as soon as possible to have your vehicle inspected. Before driving, visually check your tyres for obvious leaks, punctures, or damage. If tyre pressure is low, inflate to the recommended pressure immediately.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”发动机附件功能受限”提示，表示发动机附件（如压缩机、发电机、水泵等）有故障。可能影响空调制冷、充电或冷却功能。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在到达服务店前，注意观察是否有水温升高、空调不制冷等异常情况，必要时安全停车。
description_en: This warning indicates a malfunction in the engine accessories, such as the compressor, alternator, or water pump. This may affect your air conditioning, battery charging, or engine cooling.
action_en: Contact a BYD authorised service centre. Before you get there, keep an eye on your temperature gauge and air conditioning. If you notice overheating or the air con stops working, pull over safely.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 电源挡位位于”ON”挡时，指示灯自检常亮。如在其它任何时候点亮，则表示整车的某一控制系统可能发生故障。在这种状态下持续运转，可能导致车辆严重损坏。如果非自检时此警告灯点亮，应将车辆安全地驶到路边，整车断电至”OFF”挡，重新上电至”OK”挡，启动发动机并查看此警告灯。如果该警告灯仍然点亮，建议尽快到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查车辆。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 在比亚迪汽车授权服务店查明故障之前，应小心驾驶，避免门窗全开或高速行驶。如果此警告灯频繁点亮，即使在依照上述步骤处理后熄灭，也建议到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查车辆。
description_en: When the vehicle is in ON mode, this indicator illuminates during the system self-check. If it lights up at any other time, a vehicle control system may have malfunctioned. Continuing to drive could cause serious damage. If the light comes on outside of the self-check sequence, safely pull over to the side of the road, power off the vehicle to OFF mode, then power back on to OK mode and restart to check the indicator. If the warning light remains on, have your vehicle inspected at a BYD authorised service centre as soon as possible.
action_en: Until the fault has been diagnosed at a BYD authorised service centre, drive with caution and avoid high speeds or driving with the windows fully open. If this warning light illuminates frequently—even if it goes off after following the reset steps above—arrange for your vehicle to be inspected at a BYD authorised service centre.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 发动机故障警告灯（MIL）在启动时自检点亮，几秒后熄灭为正常。如果在行驶中持续点亮，表示发动机控制系统检测到异常。可能涉及燃油喷射系统、点火系统、排放控制系统或传感器故障。DM-i 车型在纯电模式下不会显示此灯。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议尽快到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查。在到达服务店前，避免激烈驾驶，尽量保持平稳车速。如果同时出现动力明显下降或异常噪音/振动，建议就近停车。
description_en: The Engine Malfunction Warning Light (MIL) illuminates briefly during startup as part of the system self-check and should turn off within seconds—this is normal. If the light stays on while driving, it indicates the engine management system has detected a fault. This could involve the fuel injection, ignition, or emissions control systems, or a sensor malfunction. Note: This warning will not appear on DM-i models when operating in pure electric mode.
action_en: Arrange to visit an authorised BYD service centre as soon as possible. Until you get there, avoid aggressive driving and maintain a steady, moderate speed. If you experience significant power loss, or notice abnormal noises or vibrations, pull over and stop in a safe location immediately.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 如果此指示灯点亮，表示油箱里的燃油存量已不多，需要尽快加油。在斜面或弯道时，油箱中燃油晃动，燃油低警告灯可能较通常早些点亮。DM-i 车型在燃油耗尽后仍可依靠电池以纯电模式行驶一定距离。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 需要尽快加油。在找到加油站之前，建议切换到纯电模式（如果电量充足），减少发动机燃油消耗。
description_en: This warning light indicates your vehicle is running low on petrol and needs to be refuelled soon. When driving on slopes or around bends, fuel sloshing in the tank may cause the light to come on earlier than usual. DM-i models can continue driving for a limited distance in electric mode using battery power after the petrol runs out.
action_en: Refuel as soon as possible. Until you reach a petrol station, switch to EV mode (if the battery has sufficient charge) to conserve the remaining petrol.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此警告灯用于警告机油压力过低。在行驶中，如果此警告灯闪烁或保持点亮状态，须驶离道路将车辆停在安全地点并立刻熄灭发动机。当机油液位非常低时，此警告灯也将点亮。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。请勿在警告灯点亮的状态下驾驶车辆，即使是一小段距离，否则将毁坏发动机。当发动机空转时，此警告灯可能会偶尔闪烁或紧急制动后短暂点亮，当发动机渐渐加速时如果此灯熄灭，则机油压力正常，不表示有问题。
description_en: This warning light indicates low engine oil pressure. If it flashes or stays illuminated while driving, pull over to a safe location and switch off the engine immediately. The light will also come on when the engine oil level is critically low.
action_en: Contact an authorised BYD service centre. Do not drive the vehicle while this warning light is on, even for a short distance, as this may cause serious engine damage. The light may flash occasionally while the engine is idling, or illuminate briefly after heavy braking. If the light extinguishes as the engine revs increase, the oil pressure is normal and no fault is present.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当 GPF（汽油颗粒捕集器）碳载量（排放颗粒物）达到一定量时，GPF 会主动进入再生状态，此时 GPF 指示灯处于绿色常亮状态。在路况允许的情况下尽量多跑高速工况，待颗粒物处理完成，GPF 指示灯会自动熄灭。DM-i 车型中若用户长时间 EV 行驶，会触发保养需求启动发动机，仪表会提示：为了发动机保养已自动启动发动机。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 在路况允许的情况下尽量多跑高速工况（发动机持续运转），待颗粒物处理完成后 GPF 指示灯会自动熄灭。不需要特别前往维修店。
description_en: Your petrol particulate filter (GPF) has accumulated excess soot and is actively regenerating (self-cleaning), indicated by a solid green warning light. When road conditions permit, drive on highways or open roads to allow the engine to complete the burn-off process — the light will turn off automatically once finished. Note: In DM-i models, extensive EV driving may trigger an automatic engine start for maintenance purposes, displaying the message: "Engine automatically started for engine maintenance."
action_en: Drive on highways or open roads where safe to do so, ensuring the petrol engine remains running continuously until the filter cleaning cycle completes and the warning light extinguishes automatically. No visit to a service centre is required.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当 GPF 碳载量（排放颗粒物）达到最大值时，导致油耗上升，动力性能下降，GPF 指示灯处于黄色常亮状态。此时说明 GPF 被动再生已无法完成，需要到服务店进行主动再生或清洗。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 此时需要到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查车辆。服务店可通过诊断设备执行 GPF 主动再生程序。请勿长期忽视此警告，否则可能导致 GPF 永久损坏，维修费用更高。
description_en: The GPF (Gasoline Particulate Filter) warning light illuminates solid yellow when the filter's soot load reaches maximum capacity, causing increased fuel consumption and reduced engine performance. This indicates that passive regeneration has failed and the vehicle requires active regeneration or professional cleaning at a service centre.
action_en: Take your vehicle to a BYD authorised service centre immediately for inspection. Technicians can perform GPF active regeneration using diagnostic equipment. Do not ignore this warning for extended periods, as this may cause permanent damage to the filter and result in significantly higher repair costs.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当警告灯为黄色时，表示前照灯发生故障。可能是灯泡/LED 光源损坏、线路故障或前照灯控制模块异常。前照灯故障会影响夜间行车安全和对向车辆的可见性。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议将车辆送到比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行检查。在故障修复前，避免夜间或低能见度条件下行驶。如果只是单侧灯故障，可谨慎行驶至最近的服务店。
description_en: A yellow headlight warning light indicates a fault with your vehicle's headlamps. This may be caused by a blown bulb or failed LED, a wiring issue, or a malfunction in the headlight control module. This fault compromises safety by reducing your visibility at night and making your vehicle less visible to oncoming traffic.
action_en: Take your vehicle to a BYD authorised service centre for inspection as soon as possible. Avoid driving at night or in low-visibility conditions until the repair is completed. If only one headlight is faulty, you may drive carefully to the nearest service centre.

name_cn: 智能远近光灯故障指示灯
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 智能远近光灯系统发生故障时，此指示灯点亮。该系统通过前置摄像头检测对向来车和前方车辆尾灯，自动切换远近光灯，避免对其他驾驶员造成眩目。系统故障后，自动远近光切换功能失效，需要驾驶员手动操作远近光灯开关。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检修。在系统修复前，夜间行驶时需要手动切换远近光灯。会车时请及时切换为近光灯，避免影响对向车辆驾驶员。
description_en: This indicates a fault with the Intelligent High Beam system. This feature uses a forward-facing camera to detect oncoming traffic and tail lights of vehicles ahead, automatically switching between high and low beam to prevent dazzling other drivers. When faulty, the automatic switching is disabled and you must manually control your headlights.
action_en: Contact a BYD authorised service centre to have the system inspected and repaired. Until fixed, manually switch between high and low beam when driving at night. Ensure you dip to low beam when approaching oncoming traffic to avoid dazzling other drivers.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”EV功能受限”提示，表示纯电驱动功能受到限制。可能由电池系统、电机控制器或相关高压部件异常引起。车辆可能无法以纯电模式正常行驶，动力输出和续航里程将受到影响。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议立即联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查。在到达服务店之前，尽量减少大功率输出，保持低速平稳行驶。
description_en: This warning indicates that your vehicle's electric drive function is limited. It may be caused by a fault in the battery system, motor controller, or other high-voltage components. Your vehicle may not drive normally in electric mode, with reduced power and range.
action_en: Contact an authorised BYD service centre immediately for inspection. Until you reach the service centre, avoid heavy acceleration, keep to low speeds, and drive smoothly.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 如果动力系统发生故障，此警告灯点亮。如果发生下列任何一种情况，则表示由警告灯系统监控的部件中某处发生故障。此警告灯涵盖电驱动系统（EV 车型）或混合动力系统（DM-i 车型）的核心部件故障。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议尽快与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系检查车辆。如果发生以下情况，请立即前往检修：电源挡位位于启动挡时，此警告灯持续点亮；驾驶中此警告灯点亮。尽量不要在警告灯点亮的情况下驾驶车辆，建议尽快行驶到比亚迪汽车授权服务店进行检查确认问题。
description_en: This warning light indicates a fault in the vehicle's powertrain system. It illuminates when a malfunction is detected in any monitored components, covering faults in the core electric drive system (EV models) or hybrid system (DM-i models).
action_en: Contact your nearest BYD authorised service centre immediately to arrange an inspection. If this warning light stays on when the vehicle is in READY mode, or if it comes on while driving, stop driving as soon as safely possible. Avoid driving with this warning light illuminated; if the vehicle must be moved, drive with caution directly to a BYD authorised service centre.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 当整车动力受到限制时，该指示灯点亮。可能由电池温度过高或过低、电池电量不足、电机温度过高、系统保护等原因导致动力输出被限制。在此状态下，车辆仍可行驶但加速性能会明显下降。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议及时与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在操作中，警告灯短暂点亮不表示有问题，属于正常的系统保护行为。如果持续点亮，建议检修。
description_en: This light indicates the vehicle's power output is being limited. This can occur due to extreme battery temperatures (too hot or cold), low battery charge, motor overheating, or system protection protocols. While the vehicle remains drivable, acceleration will be noticeably reduced.
action_en: Contact a BYD authorised service centre promptly. Brief illumination during driving is normal and indicates the system is protecting itself—this is not a malfunction. If the warning light stays on continuously, have the vehicle inspected.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 车辆启动自检时，此警告灯点亮，约几秒后此警告灯熄灭，表示安全气囊系统工作正常。警告灯系统用于监控安全气囊 ECU、碰撞传感器、充气装置、警告灯、接线和电源。如果系统发生故障，此灯将持续点亮或闪烁。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 如果发生以下任何一种情况，则表示由警告灯系统监控的部件中某处发生故障，建议尽快与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系检查车辆：电源挡位位于启动挡时，此警告灯上电后一直不亮或持续点亮；驾驶中此警告灯点亮或闪烁。
description_en: This warning light illuminates during vehicle startup self-check and turns off after a few seconds when the airbag system is functioning properly. The system monitors the airbag control unit, impact sensors, inflators, wiring and power supply. If a fault occurs, the light will remain on or flash.
action_en: If the warning light fails to illuminate at startup, stays on continuously, or comes on while driving, there is a fault in the airbag system. Contact a BYD authorised service centre immediately to have your vehicle inspected.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此指示灯提醒驾驶员和前排乘员扣好座椅安全带。电源挡位位于启动挡时，若驾驶员和前排乘员的座椅安全带未扣紧，则相应座椅安全带指示灯点亮。除非扣紧安全带，否则指示灯持续点亮。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请驾驶员和所有乘员系好安全带后再行驶。安全带是最基本的被动安全保护措施，在发生碰撞时能有效降低人员伤害。
description_en: This warning light indicates that the driver or front passenger seatbelt is unfastened. When the vehicle is powered on, the respective seatbelt indicator illuminates and remains lit until the seatbelt is properly buckled.
action_en: Ensure all occupants fasten their seatbelts before driving. Seatbelts are essential passive safety devices that significantly reduce the risk of injury during a collision.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 按下”启动/停止”按键，如果此时没有钥匙，则此警告灯点亮数秒，并且会伴随蜂鸣器鸣响一声，组合仪表上显示”未检测到钥匙，请确认钥匙是否在车内”。如果在车内携带有与车型匹配电子智能钥匙的情况下，按下”启动/停止”按键，此警告灯不会点亮，此时可以使车辆上电启动。如果按下”启动/停止”按键后，警告灯闪烁，则表示钥匙电池电量不足。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请确认钥匙是否在车内。如果钥匙电池电量不足（警告灯闪烁），建议尽快更换钥匙电池。在钥匙电池电量不足的情况下，可将钥匙贴近启动按键区域尝试启动车辆。
description_en: If you press the Start/Stop button without the key inside the vehicle, this warning light illuminates briefly with a single beep, while the dashboard displays "Key not detected - please confirm key is in vehicle". If the correct smart key is present in the car, this light stays off when you press Start/Stop and the vehicle will power up normally. However, if the light flashes when you press the button, the key fob battery is running low.
action_en: First, ensure the key is actually inside the vehicle. If the warning light is flashing (indicating low battery), replace the key fob battery as soon as possible. As a temporary measure when the battery is flat, hold the key directly against the Start/Stop button area to start the vehicle.

name_en: Child Presence Detection Fault Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 车内儿童遗留监测系统发生故障时，此警告灯点亮。该系统使用毫米波雷达等传感器监测熄火锁车后车内是否有儿童或活体遗留，是保护儿童安全的重要功能。故障状态下，系统无法正常监测车内情况，存在儿童被遗忘在车内的安全隐患。此功能出现在汉L、海豹06等较新车型上。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议及时联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检修。在系统修复前，驾驶员下车时务必亲自确认车内无儿童或宠物遗留，尤其是在夏季高温环境中。
description_en: This warning light indicates the Child Presence Detection (CPD) system has malfunctioned. This system uses millimetre-wave radar and sensors to monitor whether children or pets have been left inside the vehicle after it has been switched off and locked. When functioning properly, it is a vital safety feature that prevents children from being accidentally trapped inside. With the system faulty, it cannot detect occupants in the cabin, creating a serious risk if a child is forgotten in the vehicle—particularly in hot conditions. This feature is equipped on newer BYD models such as the Han L and Seal 06.
action_en: Contact a BYD authorised service centre promptly to have the system diagnosed and repaired. Until fixed, you must manually check the entire cabin—including rear seats and the boot—for children and pets every time you exit the vehicle. Do not rely on the automated system while this warning is displayed, especially during hot Australian summers when cabin temperatures can reach dangerous levels rapidly.

name_cn: 冷却液温度过高警告灯
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此警告灯常亮，表示电控冷却液温度过高（EV 车型）或发动机冷却液温度过高（DM-i 车型）。在 DM-i 车型上，在恶劣的条件下，例如酷暑季节或长时间爬坡、高速行驶，发动机可能产生过热现象。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请将车辆停至安全区域直至此灯熄灭。不要在冷却液温度过高的状态下继续驾驶，否则可能导致发动机或电机损坏。待冷却液温度降低后再继续行驶。如频繁出现，建议检查冷却系统。
description_en: This warning light indicates the electric drive system coolant is overheating (EV models) or the engine coolant is overheating (DM-i hybrid models). In DM-i vehicles, extreme conditions such as hot weather, sustained hill climbs, or high-speed driving may cause the engine to overheat.
action_en: Pull over to a safe area immediately and wait for the light to turn off. Do not continue driving while the coolant temperature is high, as this may permanently damage the engine or electric motor. Resume driving only once the temperature has returned to normal. If this warning appears frequently, have the cooling system inspected by a qualified technician.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此警告灯点亮表示驱动电机温度过高。可能由长时间高负载行驶（如长坡道、频繁急加速）或冷却系统故障引起。电机过热时，系统会限制动力输出以保护电机。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议减速行驶或安全停车等待电机降温。避免继续高负载行驶。如果频繁出现，建议到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查电机冷却系统。
description_en: This indicates your drive motor is overheating. This may occur during sustained high-load driving (such as long uphill stretches or frequent rapid acceleration) or due to a cooling system fault. The system will automatically limit power output to protect the motor.
action_en: Reduce speed and avoid heavy acceleration, or safely pull over and allow the motor to cool. If this warning appears frequently, have your vehicle inspected at an authorised BYD service centre to check the motor cooling system.

name_cn: 电机冷却液温度过高警告灯
name_en: Motor Coolant Temperature High Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此警告灯点亮表示电机冷却回路中的冷却液温度过高。与电机过热警告灯类似，但更特指冷却系统的问题。可能由冷却液不足、冷却泵故障或散热器堵塞引起。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议安全停车，等待冷却液温度下降。不要打开冷却液箱盖（高温高压危险）。如频繁出现，建议到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查冷却液液位和冷却系统。
description_en: This warning light indicates the coolant temperature in the motor cooling circuit is too high. While similar to the motor overheating warning, this specifically points to a cooling system fault. It may be triggered by low coolant levels, a faulty coolant pump, or a blocked radiator.
action_en: Safely pull over and wait for the coolant temperature to drop. Do not open the coolant reservoir cap due to the risk of hot, pressurised fluid. If this warning appears frequently, have the coolant level and cooling system inspected at a BYD authorised service centre.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”为了您的安全，遥控驾驶暂停使用”提示，表示遥控驾驶功能出现异常，系统出于安全考虑已暂停该功能。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请暂停使用遥控驾驶功能。如果需要继续使用，请到比亚迪汽车授权服务店检查。可以正常手动驾驶车辆。
description_en: This indicates the remote driving function has malfunctioned. The system has suspended remote driving for your safety.
action_en: Stop using remote driving. If you wish to continue using this feature, have your vehicle inspected at an authorised BYD service centre. You may continue driving manually as normal.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”车辆网络故障，请安全停车并联系服务店”或”请检查车辆网络”提示，表示当前车辆的数据网络可能存在故障。CAN 总线或车内以太网通信异常，可能导致多个控制器无法正常通信，影响车辆多项功能。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 应安全停车并建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。此故障可能影响车辆多项功能的正常运行，不建议继续驾驶。
description_en: This warning indicates a vehicle network fault. When your dashboard displays 'Vehicle network malfunction, please park safely and contact service centre' or 'Please check vehicle network', it means there's an issue with the vehicle's data communication system. CAN bus or in-vehicle Ethernet communication errors can prevent multiple control modules from communicating properly, potentially affecting various vehicle functions.
action_en: Safely pull over and contact an authorised BYD service centre. Do not continue driving, as this fault may impair multiple vehicle systems.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查前照灯系统”提示，表示前照灯系统有故障。与前照灯故障警告灯类似，但此提示信息出现在仪表文字提示区域，可能涉及灯泡/LED 光源、控制模块或线束问题。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在故障修复前，应避免夜间行驶。
description_en: This message on your dashboard indicates a fault with the headlight system. Similar to the headlight warning light, this text alert appears in the instrument display and may involve issues with bulbs or LED units, the control module, or wiring.
action_en: Contact an authorised BYD service centre. Avoid night driving until the fault is repaired.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查挡位系统”提示，表示挡位控制器存在故障。可能无法正常切换 P/R/N/D 挡位，或挡位信号传输异常。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 应安全停车并建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。在故障排除前，切勿强行操作挡位，以免造成更大损坏。如果车辆无法移动，请联系救援服务。
description_en: The dashboard displays a 'Check Gear System' warning, indicating a fault with the gear selector controller. You may be unable to shift between Park, Reverse, Neutral and Drive, or the gear position signals may be faulty.
action_en: Safely pull over and contact a BYD authorised service centre. Do not force the gear selector until the fault has been fixed to avoid further damage. If the vehicle is immobilised, contact roadside assistance.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”电磁阀清洗中，请等待”提示，表示系统正在执行电磁阀自动清洗程序。这是 DM-i 车型的正常维护操作。清洗期间车辆可能有轻微振动或声响。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 停车等待清洗程序完成。若故障现象长时间不消失，建议与比亚迪汽车授权服务店联系。通常此过程持续时间较短，完成后即可正常驾驶。
description_en: The 'Solenoid Valve Cleaning' message indicates your vehicle is performing an automatic system cleaning cycle. This is routine maintenance for DM-i models. You may notice slight vibrations or noises while the process runs.
action_en: Stop and wait for the cleaning cycle to complete. If the message persists for an extended period, contact an authorised BYD service centre. The process is usually brief, and normal driving can resume once finished.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 仪表显示”请检查记忆系统”提示，表示座椅/后视镜记忆功能系统存在异常。该系统允许驾驶员保存并快速调用座椅位置、后视镜角度等个性化设置。故障时可能无法保存新的位置记忆，或无法调用已保存的位置。座椅和后视镜的手动调节功能通常不受影响。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 不影响驾驶安全，可继续正常使用车辆。建议在方便时联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检修。在系统修复前，需手动调节座椅和后视镜至合适位置。
description_en: This 'Check Memory System' warning indicates a fault with the seat and mirror memory function. This system stores your preferred seat positions and mirror angles for quick recall. When faulty, you may be unable to save new positions or recall saved settings. Manual adjustment of the seats and mirrors should still function normally.
action_en: This warning does not affect driving safety and you may continue using the vehicle. Contact a BYD authorised service centre when convenient to have the system inspected. Until the issue is resolved, adjust your seats and mirrors manually to your preferred positions.

description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此指示灯点亮时表示应注意，信息显示区有故障提示信息。主告警指示灯是一个通用提示灯，它不指向某个具体的故障系统，而是提醒驾驶员查看仪表盘信息显示区的具体故障提示文字。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 请查看仪表盘信息显示区的具体故障提示信息，并按照相应提示进行处理。如果信息显示区没有具体提示，或者不确定如何处理，建议联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店。
description_en: This warning light indicates that there's a message requiring your attention displayed in the information display area. The master warning light is a general alert that doesn't point to a specific system fault, but rather prompts you to check the dashboard display for detailed warning information.
action_en: Check the dashboard information display for the specific warning message and follow the instructions provided. If no specific message appears or you're unsure what to do, contact a BYD authorised service centre.

name_cn: 低速提示音故障警告灯
name_en: Low Speed Warning Sound System Fault Warning Light
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 低速行人提示音系统发生故障时，此警告灯点亮。根据国家标准要求，电动汽车在低速行驶时（通常低于 20km/h）需要发出提示音，以提醒行人注意避让。系统故障后，车辆在低速行驶时将无法发出提示音，增加了低速行驶时与行人碰撞的风险。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 建议联系比亚迪汽车授权服务店检修。在系统修复前，低速行驶时应格外注意观察行人，尤其在停车场、小区、学校等行人密集区域。
description_en: This warning light indicates a fault with the Low-Speed Pedestrian Warning System. Electric vehicles are required to emit an audible alert when travelling at low speeds (typically under 20 km/h) to warn pedestrians of the vehicle's approach. With this system faulty, your vehicle will run silently at low speeds, significantly increasing the risk of collision with pedestrians.
action_en: Contact a BYD authorised service centre to have the system inspected and repaired. Until the fault is rectified, exercise additional caution when driving at low speeds, especially in high-pedestrian areas such as car parks, residential streets, and school zones.

name_cn: 低速提示音关闭指示灯
name_en: Low Speed Warning Sound OFF Indicator
description_cn: Section titled “这个警告灯是什么意思？” 此指示灯点亮表示驾驶员已手动关闭低速行人提示音系统。电动汽车在低速行驶时（通常低于 20km/h）发出的提示音可通过车辆设置关闭。关闭后车辆低速行驶时不再发出行人警示音。注意：部分地区法规要求此功能必须开启，关闭可能不符合当地法规。
action_cn: Section titled “出现这个警告灯怎么办？” 此灯点亮表示功能已被主动关闭，如需恢复，可在车辆设置中重新开启低速提示音。建议在行人密集区域保持此功能开启，以保障行人安全。
description_en: This indicator means the low-speed pedestrian warning system has been manually switched off. Your EV normally emits a warning sound when travelling below 20km/h to alert pedestrians and cyclists, but this can be disabled through your vehicle settings. When off, your vehicle will run silently at low speeds. Please note that some Australian jurisdictions legally require this safety feature to remain active.
action_en: This light confirms the pedestrian warning sound is currently disabled. To reactivate it, go to your vehicle settings and turn the low-speed alert back on. We recommend keeping this feature enabled in school zones, car parks, and busy urban areas to help keep pedestrians safe.
